SEARCH
Module it.polimi.ingsw.am37
Package it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game

Class GameModel

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
public class GameModel extends Object
The GameModel class contains all the information and behaviour of an instance of the game.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameModel(List<Player> participantsInOrder)
    The GameModel(participantsInOrder) constructor sets the participantsInOrder attribute to the list of player given as a parameter.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createHand()
    The method createHand sets the starting cards the players will have in their hand right after placing the start card.
    List<StandardCard>
    getAvailableGCards()
    The getAvailableGCards() method returns the list of currently available GoldCards.
    List<StandardCard>
    getAvailableRCards()
    The getAvailableRCards() method returns the list of currently available ResourceCards.
    GameStatus
    getCurrentStatus()
    the getCurrentStatus method returns the current status of the game.
    Player
    getCurrentTurn()
    The getCurrentTurn() method returns the Player who is playing his turn right now.
    PlayerPoints[]
    getGameWinner()
    The getGameWinner() method calculates everyone's final points and then returns the final scoreboard.
    GoldDeck
    getGDeck()
    The getGDeck() method returns the instance of the Gold Deck that is used during the game.
    int
    getLastTurn()
    the getLastTurn method returns the last turn of the game.
    ObjectiveDeck
    getODeck()
    The getODeck() method returns the instance of the Objective Deck that is used during the game.
    List<Player>
    getParticipants()
    The getParticipants() method returns the list of Player that participates in the game.
    ObjectiveCard[]
    getPublicObjectives()
    The getPublicObjectives() method returns the array of public objectives that anyone can fulfill to get points.
    ResourceDeck
    getRDeck()
    The getRDeck() method returns the instance of the Resource Deck that is used during the game.
    Scoreboard
    getScoreboard()
    The getScoreboard() method returns the scoreboard of the game.
    StartDeck
    getSDeck()
    The getSDeck() method returns the instance of the Start Deck that is used during the game.
    int
    getTurnCounter()
    The getTurnCounter() method returns the current turn number.
    void
    giveObjectiveCards()
    the method giveObjectiveCards gives each player the choice of their personal objectives.
    void
    giveStartCard()
    the method giveStartCard gives the player the choice of the first card he's going to place, the starting card.
    void
    nextTurn()
    The nextTurn() method updates the value of the currentTurn attribute, that contains the Player that is currently playing his turn.
    void
    setAvailableCards()
    The method setAvailableCards sets up the list of available and cards that the player is able to see and can draw when in his turn.
    void
    setCurrentStatus(GameStatus currentStatus)
    the setCurrentStatus method sets the current status of the game.
    void
    setPublicObjectives()
    The method setPublicObjectives sets up the objectives the players have in common.
    void
    setupEndGame()
    the setupEndGame method calculate which is going to be the number of the last turn.
    void
    setupPlayPhase()
    the setupPlayPhase sets the turn counter and proceed to randomly create the order of the player's turns, setting then the current turn.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • GameModel

      public GameModel(List<Player> participantsInOrder)
      The GameModel(participantsInOrder) constructor sets the participantsInOrder attribute to the list of player given as a parameter. Then it initializes the scoreboard and creates an empty list that will contain the disconnected player. Finally, it creates the deck that will be used during the game and sets the current phase to preparation.
      Parameters:
      participantsInOrder - A list of 2 to 4 player that are the participants of this instance of the game.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentStatus

      public GameStatus getCurrentStatus()
      the getCurrentStatus method returns the current status of the game.
      Returns:
      the current status of the game.

    • setCurrentStatus

      public void setCurrentStatus(GameStatus currentStatus)
      the setCurrentStatus method sets the current status of the game.
      Parameters:
      currentStatus - is the current status of the game.

    • getParticipants

      public List<Player> getParticipants()
      The getParticipants() method returns the list of Player that participates in the game.
      Returns:
      The participantsInOrder attribute.

    • getScoreboard

      public Scoreboard getScoreboard()
      The getScoreboard() method returns the scoreboard of the game.
      Returns:
      The scoreboard attribute.

    • getGDeck

      public GoldDeck getGDeck()
      The getGDeck() method returns the instance of the Gold Deck that is used during the game.
      Returns:
      The gDeck attribute.

    • getRDeck

      public ResourceDeck getRDeck()
      The getRDeck() method returns the instance of the Resource Deck that is used during the game.
      Returns:
      The rDeck attribute.

    • getSDeck

      public StartDeck getSDeck()
      The getSDeck() method returns the instance of the Start Deck that is used during the game.
      Returns:
      The sDeck attribute.

    • getODeck

      public ObjectiveDeck getODeck()
      The getODeck() method returns the instance of the Objective Deck that is used during the game.
      Returns:
      The oDeck attribute.

    • getAvailableRCards

      public List<StandardCard> getAvailableRCards()
      The getAvailableRCards() method returns the list of currently available ResourceCards.
      Returns:
      The availableRCards attribute.

    • getAvailableGCards

      public List<StandardCard> getAvailableGCards()
      The getAvailableGCards() method returns the list of currently available GoldCards.
      Returns:
      The availableGCards attribute.

    • getPublicObjectives

      public ObjectiveCard[] getPublicObjectives()
      The getPublicObjectives() method returns the array of public objectives that anyone can fulfill to get points.
      Returns:
      The publicObjectives attribute.

    • setAvailableCards

      public void setAvailableCards() throws NoCardsException
      The method setAvailableCards sets up the list of available and cards that the player is able to see and can draw when in his turn.
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - if the deck ran out of cards.

    • giveStartCard

      public void giveStartCard() throws NoCardsException, AlreadyAssignedException
      the method giveStartCard gives the player the choice of the first card he's going to place, the starting card.
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - if the deck ran out of cards.
      AlreadyAssignedException - if the player has already had his starting card.

    • createHand

      public void createHand() throws NoCardsException, AlreadyAssignedException
      The method createHand sets the starting cards the players will have in their hand right after placing the start card.
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - if the deck ran out of cards.
      AlreadyAssignedException - if the player that invoked this method already has had his hand set up.

    • setPublicObjectives

      public void setPublicObjectives() throws NoCardsException
      The method setPublicObjectives sets up the objectives the players have in common. All the players can see these objectives.
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - if the objectives deck ran out of cards.

    • giveObjectiveCards

      public void giveObjectiveCards() throws NoCardsException, AlreadyAssignedException
      the method giveObjectiveCards gives each player the choice of their personal objectives. Every player will be able to see only their personal two objectives.
      Throws:
      NoCardsException - if the deck ran out of cards.
      AlreadyAssignedException - if the private objectives have already been assigned.

    • setupPlayPhase

      public void setupPlayPhase()
      the setupPlayPhase sets the turn counter and proceed to randomly create the order of the player's turns, setting then the current turn.

    • getCurrentTurn

      public Player getCurrentTurn()
      The getCurrentTurn() method returns the Player who is playing his turn right now.
      Returns:
      The Player that is playing his turn.

    • getTurnCounter

      public int getTurnCounter()
      The getTurnCounter() method returns the current turn number.
      Returns:
      The turnCounter attribute.

    • nextTurn

      public void nextTurn()
      The nextTurn() method updates the value of the currentTurn attribute, that contains the Player that is currently playing his turn.

    • setupEndGame

      public void setupEndGame()
      the setupEndGame method calculate which is going to be the number of the last turn.

    • getLastTurn

      public int getLastTurn()
      the getLastTurn method returns the last turn of the game.
      Returns:
      the number of the last turn.

    • getGameWinner

      public PlayerPoints[] getGameWinner()
      The getGameWinner() method calculates everyone's final points and then returns the final scoreboard.
      Returns:
      The final Scoreboard of the game.
